title: Fix workspace runtime crash from OpenClaw status timeout abort
summary: Removed AbortController timeout abort path that triggered unhandled runtime errors in workspace view.
changes: Replaced abort-driven OpenClaw status fetch with direct non-blocking fetch path.
Preserved offline fallback behavior when status checks fail.
Eliminated runtime AbortError surface in workspace UI.
risks: Status check now relies on network stack timeout behavior instead of explicit abort timing.
rollback: Reintroduce timeout+AbortController in checkOpenClaw path if needed.
